title: Additional Tool Post-Install Hooks
description: Extend default post-install hooks to more tools that commonly need post-installation configuration
acceptance_criteria: Tools with common post-install needs have default hooks
Hooks follow idempotent pattern (check before modify)
All hooks work in CI environments

existing_hooks: kubectl - shell completion and k alias

tasks.title: Add node default hook
tasks.description: Configure npm global prefix and add to PATH
tasks.hook_script:
# Configure npm prefix for global installs
mkdir -p ~/.npm-global
npm config set prefix '~/.npm-global'
if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ] && ! grep -q '.npm-global/bin' "$HOME/.bashrc"; then
    echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$PATH"' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"
fi
if [ -f "$HOME/.zshrc" ] && ! grep -q '.npm-global/bin' "$HOME/.zshrc"; then
    echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$PATH"' >> "$HOME/.zshrc"
fi

tasks.title: Add python default hook
tasks.description: Upgrade pip and configure user site-packages PATH
tasks.hook_script:
# Upgrade pip and configure PATH for user packages
python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip --quiet 2>/dev/null || true
USER_SITE=$(python3 -m site --user-base)/bin
if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ] && ! grep -q 'python.*user-base' "$HOME/.bashrc"; then
    echo 'export PATH="'"$USER_SITE"':$PATH"' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"
fi
if [ -f "$HOME/.zshrc" ] && ! grep -q 'python.*user-base' "$HOME/.zshrc"; then
    echo 'export PATH="'"$USER_SITE"':$PATH"' >> "$HOME/.zshrc"
fi

tasks.title: Add rust default hook
tasks.description: Install common rustup components and configure cargo PATH
tasks.hook_script:
# Add rustup components if not present
rustup component add clippy 2>/dev/null || true
rustup component add rustfmt 2>/dev/null || true
if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ] && ! grep -q '.cargo/bin' "$HOME/.bashrc"; then
    echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"
fi
if [ -f "$HOME/.zshrc" ] && ! grep -q '.cargo/bin' "$HOME/.zshrc"; then
    echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"' >> "$HOME/.zshrc"
fi

tasks.title: Add helm default hook
tasks.hook_script:
# Add common Helm repositories if not present
helm repo list 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'stable' || helm repo add stable https://charts.helm.sh/stable 2>/dev/null || true
helm repo list 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'bitnami' || helm repo add bitnami https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami 2>/dev/null || true
helm repo update 2>/dev/null || true

tasks.title: Add awscli default hook
tasks.description: Configure AWS CLI defaults and shell completion
tasks.hook_script:
# Configure AWS CLI completion
if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ] && ! grep -q 'aws_completer' "$HOME/.bashrc"; then
    echo 'complete -C aws_completer aws' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"
fi
if [ -f "$HOME/.zshrc" ] && ! grep -q 'aws_zsh_completer' "$HOME/.zshrc"; then
    echo 'autoload bashcompinit && bashcompinit && complete -C aws_completer aws' >> "$HOME/.zshrc"
fi

tasks.title: Add gh (GitHub CLI) default hook
tasks.description: Configure shell completion for GitHub CLI
tasks.hook_script:
# Configure gh CLI completion
if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ] && ! grep -q 'gh completion' "$HOME/.bashrc"; then
    echo 'eval "$(gh completion -s bash)"' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"
fi
if [ -f "$HOME/.zshrc" ] && ! grep -q 'gh completion' "$HOME/.zshrc"; then
    echo 'eval "$(gh completion -s zsh)"' >> "$HOME/.zshrc"
fi

tasks.title: Add docker default hook
tasks.description: Add user to docker group on Linux
tasks.hook_script:
# Add current user to docker group (Linux only)
if [ "$(uname)" = "Linux" ]; then
    if ! groups | grep -q docker; then
        echo 'Note: To run docker without sudo, run: sudo usermod -aG docker $USER'
    fi
fi

tasks.title: Add k9s default hook
tasks.hook_script:
# Configure k9s completion
if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ] && ! grep -q 'k9s completion' "$HOME/.bashrc"; then
    echo 'source <(k9s completion bash)' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"
fi
if [ -f "$HOME/.zshrc" ] && ! grep -q 'k9s completion' "$HOME/.zshrc"; then
    echo 'source <(k9s completion zsh)' >> "$HOME/.zshrc"
fi

tasks.title: Add lazygit default hook
tasks.hook_script:
# Add lg alias for lazygit
if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ] && ! grep -q 'alias lg=' "$HOME/.bashrc"; then
    echo 'alias lg=lazygit' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"
fi
if [ -f "$HOME/.zshrc" ] && ! grep -q 'alias lg=' "$HOME/.zshrc"; then
    echo 'alias lg=lazygit' >> "$HOME/.zshrc"
fi

tasks.title: Add bat default hook
tasks.description: Set bat as MANPAGER for colored man pages
tasks.hook_script:
# Configure bat as MANPAGER
if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ] && ! grep -q 'MANPAGER.*bat' "$HOME/.bashrc"; then
    echo 'export MANPAGER="sh -c '\''col -bx | bat -l man -p'\''"' >> "$HOME/.bashrc"
fi
if [ -f "$HOME/.zshrc" ] && ! grep -q 'MANPAGER.*bat' "$HOME/.zshrc"; then
    echo 'export MANPAGER="sh -c '\''col -bx | bat -l man -p'\''"' >> "$HOME/.zshrc"
fi

implementation_notes.pattern: All hooks follow idempotent pattern: check with grep before appending
implementation_notes.ci_compatible: Hooks must work in CI environments (non-interactive)
implementation_notes.advisory: Hook failures should be warnings, not errors
implementation_notes.precedence: User-defined hooks in [hooks.{tool}] take complete precedence
